title: Xtra Bouncy Indian Chicken Biryani
description: Rich and flavorful Indian dish featuring golden caster sugar and a soffritto base, perfect for a post-workout meal, this low-carb friendly recipe is a great way to refuel.
instructions: Heat the ghee in a large pan over medium heat and add the cumin seeds.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook until it is browned on all sides and cooked through.
Add the golden caster sugar, coriander powder, and salt, and stir well.
Add the basmati rice and stir well to combine with the chicken and spice mixture.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 15 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Turn off the heat and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
